name: Cloaked in the Night
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's {Counter} +[StateArg1]%. "Defense" grants Temporary {Counter} equal to the wielder's DEF ×[StateArg2]%. In Boss Battles, this becomes 3 times the Temporary {Counter}. After {Death Resistance} triggers, deals {Fixed DMG} equal to the wielder's {Counter} stack count [StateArg3]% to all enemies.
lore:
The giant beast lurks in the night.

Inside the cabin, a mother wails for her lost daughter, finally breaking through the restraint she held all day.

Every midnight, her grief bursts forth, raw and unhidden.

It begins with sobs and rises to howls, then comes the calling of the name that no longer belongs to the beast.

The agony in her voice pierces the beast's heart, a heart that remains entirely human.

<Italic:Come home, Lisa.>
<Italic:Oh, my Lisa.>

The beast remains silent.

It curls up in the darkness and falls into a deep sleep.

One day, it will return—to the place called "home".
